## Summary

<!-- Describe what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] `feat` — New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] `feat!` — Breaking change
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Business logic is in `common/` (no platform-specific code in common)
- [ ] New features have unit tests in `common/src/test/`
- [ ] Javadoc added for all `public` classes and methods
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (Bukkit, Fabric, Forge, or NeoForge)
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] No hardcoded platform-specific values in `common/`

## Platforms Tested

- [ ] Bukkit/Spigot/Paper
- [ ] Fabric
- [ ] Forge
- [ ] NeoForge
